nodes.name: On new inbox row (called by Watcher)

parameters.query: UPDATE inbox SET status='processing', attempts=attempts+1, processed_at=now() WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM inbox WHERE (status='pending' AND attempts < 5) OR (status='processing' AND attempts < 5 AND processed_at < now() - interval '15 minutes') ORDER BY received_at ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED) RETURNING id, payload;

parameters.jsCode: const all=$input.all();if(!all.length||!all[0].json||!all[0].json.id){return [];}const item=all[0].json;let pl=item.payload;if(typeof pl==='string'){try{pl=JSON.parse(pl);}catch(e){pl={};}}pl=pl||{};const inbox_id=item.id||null;const account=pl.account||'UNKNOWN';const title=pl.title||('Call '+(pl.dedup_key||''));const dedup_key=pl.dedup_key||('call-'+inbox_id);const transcript=pl.transcript||'';const e=s=>String(s).replace(/'/g,"''");const unknown=(account==='UNKNOWN');const doms=Array.isArray(pl.external_domains)?pl.external_domains.filter(x=>typeof x==='string'&&/^[a-z0-9.\-]+$/i.test(x)).slice(0,5):[];const orgs=[...new Set(doms.map(dm=>String(dm).split('.')[0]).filter(o=>o.length>=3&&!['www','gov','com','org','net','mail','email'].includes(o)))];const domCond=orgs.map(o=>"cd0.name ILIKE '%"+e(o)+"%'").join(' OR ');const guessCte="WITH guess AS (SELECT cd0.name AS name FROM client_directory cd0 WHERE ("+domCond+") ORDER BY length(cd0.name) ASC LIMIT 1)";const ensureSql=unknown?(domCond?(guessCte+", a AS (INSERT INTO accounts (name,last_verified) SELECT g.name, now() FROM guess g ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET last_verified=now() RETURNING id, name) SELECT a.id AS account_id, a.name AS resolved_account,(SELECT count(*) FROM projects p WHERE p.account_id=a.id) AS project_count FROM a UNION ALL SELECT NULL::uuid AS account_id, NULL::text AS resolved_account, 1 AS project_count WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM guess);"):"SELECT NULL::uuid AS account_id, NULL::text AS resolved_account, 1 AS project_count;"):"WITH a AS (INSERT INTO accounts (name,last_verified) VALUES ('"+e(account)+"',now()) ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET last_verified=now() RETURNING id, name) SELECT a.id AS account_id, a.name AS resolved_account,(SELECT count(*) FROM projects p WHERE p.account_id=a.id) AS project_count FROM a;";const ctxSql=unknown?(domCond?(guessCte+" SELECT a.id AS account_id, a.name AS account, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id',p.id,'name',p.name,'value',p.sow_value,'status',p.sow_status)) FROM projects p WHERE p.account_id=a.id),'[]'::json) AS projects, a.feedback_summary, COALESCE((SELECT string_agg('PROJECT: '||w.project_title||' [RAG '||COALESCE(w.rag,'?')||' | phase '||COALESCE(w.phase,'?')||' | week ending '||w.week_ending||']'||chr(10)||'Summary: '||COALESCE(w.summary,'')||chr(10)||'Lowlights: '||COALESCE(w.lowlights,'')||chr(10)||'Risks: '||COALESCE(w.risks,'')||chr(10)||'Next week: '||COALESCE(w.next_week,''), chr(10)||chr(10)) FROM weekly_reports w WHERE w.account_id=a.id AND w.week_ending >= current_date - 14), '') AS weekly_reports, COALESCE((SELECT string_agg(s.name||' - '||COALESCE(s.job_title,'?')||COALESCE(' ['||s.buying_role||']',''), chr(10)) FROM stakeholders s WHERE s.account_id=a.id), '') AS stakeholders, COALESCE((SELECT string_agg(d.name||' - GBP '||COALESCE(d.amount::text,'?')||' - '||COALESCE(d.stage,'?'), chr(10)) FROM deals d WHERE d.account_id=a.id AND d.is_open), '') AS open_deals, ''::text AS directory FROM accounts a JOIN guess g ON lower(a.name)=lower(g.name) UNION ALL SELECT NULL::uuid, 'UNKNOWN'::text, '[]'::json, NULL::text, ''::text, ''::text, ''::text, (SELECT string_agg(name, '; ' ORDER BY name) FROM client_directory) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM accounts a3 JOIN guess g2 ON lower(a3.name)=lower(g2.name));"):"SELECT NULL::uuid AS account_id, 'UNKNOWN'::text AS account, '[]'::json AS projects, NULL::text AS feedback_summary, ''::text AS weekly_reports, ''::text AS stakeholders, ''::text AS open_deals, (SELECT string_agg(name, '; ' ORDER BY name) FROM client_directory) AS directory;"):"SELECT a.id AS account_id, a.name AS account, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id',p.id,'name',p.name,'value',p.sow_value,'status',p.sow_status)) FROM projects p WHERE p.account_id=a.id),'[]'::json) AS projects, a.feedback_summary, COALESCE((SELECT string_agg('PROJECT: '||w.project_title||' [RAG '||COALESCE(w.rag,'?')||' | phase '||COALESCE(w.phase,'?')||' | week ending '||w.week_ending||']'||chr(10)||'Summary: '||COALESCE(w.summary,'')||chr(10)||'Lowlights: '||COALESCE(w.lowlights,'')||chr(10)||'Risks: '||COALESCE(w.risks,'')||chr(10)||'Next week: '||COALESCE(w.next_week,''), chr(10)||chr(10)) FROM weekly_reports w WHERE w.account_id=a.id AND w.week_ending >= current_date - 14), '') AS weekly_reports, COALESCE((SELECT string_agg(s.name||' - '||COALESCE(s.job_title,'?')||COALESCE(' ['||s.buying_role||']',''), chr(10)) FROM stakeholders s WHERE s.account_id=a.id), '') AS stakeholders, COALESCE((SELECT string_agg(d.name||' - GBP '||COALESCE(d.amount::text,'?')||' - '||COALESCE(d.stage,'?'), chr(10)) FROM deals d WHERE d.account_id=a.id AND d.is_open), '') AS open_deals FROM accounts a WHERE lower(a.name)=lower('"+e(account)+"');";return [{json:{account,title,dedup_key,transcript,ensureSql,ctxSql,inbox_id}}];

parameters.jsonBody: {"query":"query { boards(ids:[1126338886]){ items_page(limit:200){ items { id name group{ title } column_values(ids:[\"date\",\"date6\",\"sow_status\",\"status\"]){ id text } subitems { column_values(ids:[\"numbers\"]){ id text } } } } } }"}

parameters.query: SELECT key, content FROM tn_knowledge WHERE key IN ('signal_definitions','risk_framework','opportunity_framework','tone_of_voice');

parameters.jsCode:
const prep=$('Prep').first().json;const ctx=$('Read context').first().json;let projects=ctx.projects;if(typeof projects==='string'){try{projects=JSON.parse(projects);}catch(e){projects=[];}}projects=Array.isArray(projects)?projects:[];const titleL=(prep.title||'').toLowerCase();let proj=projects.find(p=>{const nm=(p.name||'').toLowerCase();if(!nm)return false;const tok=nm.split(/[^a-z0-9]+/).filter(w=>w.length>=3);return tok.some(w=>titleL.includes(w));})||null;if(!proj&&projects.length===1){proj=projects[0];}const project_id=proj?proj.id:null;const projLine=proj?('IDENTIFIED PROJECT: '+proj.name):'IDENTIFIED PROJECT: (none matched - leave project null)';const lines=projects.length?projects.map(p=>'- '+p.name+(p.value?(' (GBP '+p.value+')'):'')+(p.status?(' ['+p.status+']'):'')).join('
'):'(no known projects yet)';const kn={};for(const it of $('Load TN knowledge').all()){kn[it.json.key]=it.json.content;}const lessons=(ctx.feedback_summary&&String(ctx.feedback_summary).trim())?('

[LESSONS FROM HUMAN FEEDBACK — apply these corrections to avoid repeating past mistakes]
'+ctx.feedback_summary):'';const systemMessage='You are the signal classifier for the Tecknuovo second brain. Apply the frameworks below.

[SIGNAL DEFINITIONS]
'+(kn.signal_definitions||'')+'

[RISK FRAMEWORK]
'+(kn.risk_framework||'')+'

[OPPORTUNITY FRAMEWORK]
'+(kn.opportunity_framework||'')+'

[TONE OF VOICE]
'+(kn.tone_of_voice||'')+'

Never use em dashes in any text; use plain hyphens or commas. Return ONLY JSON with a top-level signals array and a top-level budget_remaining field. If the user message contains an ACCOUNT IDENTIFICATION section, ALSO include a top-level account_name field set to exactly one candidate name copied verbatim, or null if unclear. If it contains a PROJECT IDENTIFICATION section, ALSO include a top-level project_name field set to exactly one known project name copied verbatim, or null if unclear. Each signal has these fields: type (one of risk, opportunity, update, people), subtype, summary, quote, suggested_action, details. Score STRICTLY using the frameworks above. For a RISK, details has risk_category (one of the 14), likelihood (1 to 5) and impact (1 to 5). For an OPPORTUNITY, details has networks_total (the NETWORKS score out of 40). Otherwise details is empty. Do NOT include a confidence field; it is computed from your scores. budget_remaining is the remaining SOW budget in pounds as a plain number if the call states it (e.g. 300000), otherwise 0. BALANCE PRECISION AND RECALL. Capture EVERY genuine risk, opportunity and people signal - do NOT miss material ones. But be strict about NOISE: do not raise a signal for routine cadence or stand-ups, routine progress with no decision, client praise or thanks, scheduling, onboarding or kick-off logistics, or merely confirming a SOW is approved or signed. Type definitions: RISK is a real threat to the SOW, delivery, compliance or reputation, INCLUDING working at risk on an unsigned or not-yet-countersigned SOW; OPPORTUNITY is a concrete chance for commercial action such as an extension, new work or scope growth, weighted by WHO said it (a budget holder or buyer counts far more than an administrator); PEOPLE is joiners, leavers, morale, SC clearance or capacity issues that need attention; UPDATE is a real delivery milestone, go-live, deliverable completed or key decision - not routine progress. For EVERY risk and opportunity you MUST give a specific, useful suggested_action naming who does what next. For each opportunity score the 8 NETWORKS components and set networks_total out of 40 (never 0 for a genuine opportunity). A call usually contains several signals; ground each in an exact transcript quote.'+lessons;const weekly=(ctx.weekly_reports&&String(ctx.weekly_reports).trim())?('

LATEST WEEKLY DELIVERY REPORT (recent status for this account - background context; signals must come from the call itself):
'+ctx.weekly_reports):'';const stak=(ctx.stakeholders&&String(ctx.stakeholders).trim())?('

KNOWN CLIENT STAKEHOLDERS (from CRM - use for the WHO weighting on opportunities: buying role in brackets when known, otherwise infer buying power from the job title):
'+ctx.stakeholders):'';const dealsCtx=(ctx.open_deals&&String(ctx.open_deals).trim())?('

OPEN COMMERCIAL PIPELINE (from CRM - deals already being pursued on this account; if the call discusses one of these, treat progress on it as an update, and only raise an opportunity for genuinely NEW scope):
'+ctx.open_deals):'';const acctName=(ctx.account&&ctx.account!=='UNKNOWN')?ctx.account:prep.account;const idTask=(acctName==='UNKNOWN'&&ctx.directory&&String(ctx.directory).trim())?('

ACCOUNT IDENTIFICATION: the account for this call is unknown. From the transcript, determine which client this call is about. CANDIDATE CLIENTS: '+ctx.directory+'
In your JSON output, include a top-level field account_name set to EXACTLY one candidate name copied verbatim from the list, or null if the transcript does not make it clear. Do NOT invent a name.'):'';const projTask=(ctx.account_id&&!project_id&&projects.length>1)?'

PROJECT IDENTIFICATION: if this call is clearly about exactly ONE of the KNOWN PROJECTS / SOWs listed above, include a top-level field project_name set to that project name copied verbatim from the list; otherwise set project_name to null. Do not guess.':'';const user='ACCOUNT: '+acctName+'
'+projLine+'
KNOWN PROJECTS / SOWs:
'+lines+weekly+stak+dealsCtx+idTask+projTask+'

CALL: '+prep.title+'
TRANSCRIPT:
'+prep.transcript;return [{json:{systemMessage,user,account:prep.account,title:prep.title,dedup_key:prep.dedup_key,transcript:prep.transcript,account_id:ctx.account_id,project_id}}];

const a=$('Assemble context').first().json;let parsed=$json.output;if(typeof parsed==='string'){parsed=parsed.replace(/```json/gi,'').replace(/```/g,'').trim();try{parsed=JSON.parse(parsed);}catch(e){parsed={signals:[]};}}if(!parsed||typeof parsed!=='object')parsed={signals:[]};if(!Array.isArray(parsed.signals))parsed.signals=[];const types=['opportunity','risk','update','people'];const SQ=String.fromCharCode(39);const q=s=>(s===null||s===undefined||s==='')?'NULL':SQ+String(s).split(SQ).join(SQ+SQ)+SQ;const sigs=parsed.signals.filter(s=>s&&types.includes(String(s.type||'').toLowerCase()));const rows=sigs.map(s=>{for(const k of ['summary','quote','suggested_action','subtype']){if(typeof s[k]==='string')s[k]=s[k].replace(/\u2014/g,'-');}const t=String(s.type).toLowerCase();const d=(s.details&&typeof s.details==='object')?s.details:{};let conf='NULL';if(t==='risk'){const L=Number(d.likelihood)||0,I=Number(d.impact)||0,score=L*I;d.likelihood=L;d.impact=I;d.score=score;d.band=score>=20?'Critical':score>=12?'High':score>=8?'Medium':score>=4?'Low-Medium':'Low';if(score>0)conf=Math.round(score/25*100);}else if(t==='opportunity'){const nw=(d.networks&&typeof d.networks==='object')?d.networks:{};let total=0,any=false;['n','e','t','w','o','r','k','s'].forEach(k=>{const v=Number(nw[k]);if(nw[k]!==undefined&&!isNaN(v)){total+=v;any=true;}});if(!any&&d.networks_total!=null&&d.networks_total!==''){total=Number(d.networks_total)||0;any=true;}d.networks_total=total;d.band=total>=28?'High':total>=16?'Moderate':'Low';if(any)conf=Math.round(total/40*100);}return '('+q(t)+','+q(s.subtype)+','+q(s.summary)+','+q(s.quote)+','+q(s.suggested_action)+','+conf+','+q(JSON.stringify(d))+'::jsonb)';});const guess=(!a.account_id&&parsed&&typeof parsed.account_name==='string'&&parsed.account_name.trim())?parsed.account_name.trim():null;const acctId=a.account_id?q(a.account_id):(guess?'(SELECT id FROM ga)':'NULL');const projGuess=(a.account_id&&!a.project_id&&parsed&&typeof parsed.project_name==='string'&&parsed.project_name.trim())?parsed.project_name.trim():null;const projId=a.project_id?q(a.project_id):(projGuess?'(SELECT id FROM gp)':'NULL');let sql;if(!rows.length){sql='SELECT '+SQ+'no signals'+SQ+' AS note;';}else{sql=(guess?((function(){var L=SQ+'%'+SQ;var g=q(guess);return 'WITH pick AS (SELECT cd.name FROM client_directory cd WHERE lower(cd.name)=lower('+g+') OR '+g+' ILIKE '+L+'||cd.name||'+L+' OR cd.name ILIKE '+L+'||'+g+'||'+L+' ORDER BY (lower(cd.name)=lower('+g+')) DESC, length(cd.name) DESC LIMIT 1), canon AS (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT cd2.name FROM client_directory cd2 WHERE length(cd2.name)>=3 AND (SELECT name FROM pick) ILIKE '+L+'||cd2.name||'+L+' ORDER BY length(cd2.name) ASC LIMIT 1),(SELECT name FROM pick)) AS name), ga AS (INSERT INTO accounts (name,last_verified) SELECT name, now() FROM canon WHERE name IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET last_verified=now() RETURNING id), ';})()):(projGuess?((function(){var L=SQ+'%'+SQ;var g=q(projGuess);return 'WITH gp AS (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE account_id='+q(a.account_id)+' AND (lower(name)=lower('+g+') OR name ILIKE '+L+'||'+g+'||'+L+' OR '+g+' ILIKE '+L+'||name||'+L+') ORDER BY length(name) DESC LIMIT 1), ';})()):'WITH '))+'c AS (INSERT INTO calls (title,account_id,project_id,source,dedup_key,transcript,call_date) VALUES ('+q(a.title)+','+acctId+','+projId+','+q('teams')+','+q(a.dedup_key)+','+q(a.transcript)+',now()) RETURNING id) INSERT INTO signals (call_id,account_id,project_id,type,subtype,summary,quote,suggested_action,confidence,details) SELECT c.id,'+acctId+','+projId+',v.type,v.subtype,v.summary,v.quote,v.action,v.conf::numeric,v.details FROM c,(VALUES '+rows.join(',')+') AS v(type,subtype,summary,quote,action,conf,details);';}const br=(parsed&&parsed.budget_remaining!=null&&parsed.budget_remaining!=='')?Number(parsed.budget_remaining):0;if(br>0&&a.project_id){sql=sql+' UPDATE projects SET budget_remaining='+br+', last_verified=now() WHERE id='+SQ+a.project_id+SQ+';';}return [{json:{sql,signal_count:rows.length,account_guess:guess,project_guess:projGuess,had_account:!!a.account_id}}];

parameters.query: UPDATE weekly_reports w SET account_id = a.id FROM accounts a WHERE w.account_id IS NULL AND (w.project_title ILIKE '%'||a.name||'%' OR (w.account_name IS NOT NULL AND (w.account_name ILIKE '%'||a.name||'%' OR a.name ILIKE '%'||w.account_name||'%'))); UPDATE deals dl SET account_id = a.id FROM accounts a WHERE dl.account_id IS NULL AND ((dl.company_name IS NOT NULL AND (lower(dl.company_name)=lower(a.name) OR dl.company_name ILIKE '%'||a.name||'%' OR a.name ILIKE '%'||dl.company_name||'%')) OR (length(split_part(dl.name,' - ',1)) BETWEEN 3 AND 40 AND (split_part(dl.name,' - ',1) ILIKE a.name OR a.name ILIKE '%'||split_part(dl.name,' - ',1)||'%'))); UPDATE stakeholders st SET account_id = a.id FROM accounts a WHERE st.account_id IS NULL AND st.company_name IS NOT NULL AND (lower(st.company_name)=lower(a.name) OR st.company_name ILIKE '%'||a.name||'%' OR a.name ILIKE '%'||st.company_name||'%'); INSERT INTO projects (monday_item_id, name, account_id, account_name, phase, rag, delivery_manager_name, last_verified) SELECT 'wr:'||w.project_title, NULLIF(trim(regexp_replace(w.project_title,'(Weekly )?(Delivery )?Summary\s*$','','i')),''), w.account_id, w.account_name, w.phase, w.rag, w.customer_lead, now() FROM weekly_reports w WHERE w.week_ending=(SELECT max(week_ending) FROM weekly_reports) AND w.account_id IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT (monday_item_id) DO UPDATE SET account_id=COALESCE(EXCLUDED.account_id, projects.account_id), phase=EXCLUDED.phase, rag=EXCLUDED.rag, delivery_manager_name=EXCLUDED.delivery_manager_name, last_verified=now(); UPDATE calls c SET project_id=p.id FROM projects p WHERE c.project_id IS NULL AND c.account_id=p.account_id AND (SELECT count(*) FROM projects p2 WHERE p2.account_id=c.account_id)=1; UPDATE signals sg SET project_id=p.id FROM projects p WHERE sg.project_id IS NULL AND sg.account_id=p.account_id AND (SELECT count(*) FROM projects p2 WHERE p2.account_id=sg.account_id)=1;
=UPDATE inbox SET status='done', processed_at=now() WHERE id = '{{ $('Prep').first().json.inbox_id }}';
